title: RSW 10 Family Gingerbread 12" Crackers – Fun Christmas Crackers with Gingerbread Man & Candy Cane Designs – Includes Hats, Mottos & Festive Gifts
features: BOX OF 10 FAMILY CRACKERS – Ten 12-inch crackers with candy cane stripes, star patterns and adorable gingerbread man designs
BRIGHT AND FESTIVE LOOK – Finished with white curling ribbon for a cheerful and coordinated table display
FUN CONTENTS – Each cracker includes a paper hat, motto and a novelty gift to keep guests entertained
PERFECT FOR FAMILY CELEBRATIONS – A playful addition to Christmas dinners, parties and seasonal get-togethers
ECO-FRIENDLY CHOICE – Recyclable crackers and packaging make this a sustainable option for festive celebrations
description: Add a sweet and playful touch to your festive table with the RSW 10 Family Gingerbread 12" Crackers. This set of ten features a delightful mix of red and white candy cane stripes, star patterns, and charming gingerbread man illustrations wearing cosy winter hats and scarves. Finished with crisp white curling ribbon, these crackers create a bright and cheerful display that guests of all ages will enjoy. Inside each cracker, you’ll find a paper hat, motto, and a novelty gift to keep everyone entertained throughout the meal. These little surprises are perfect for sparking laughter and conversation around the Christmas table, making them ideal for family gatherings and festive parties. The crackers and their packaging are recyclable, offering a more environmentally friendly way to celebrate. Their generous 12" size means they look impressive on any table setting and are designed to bring joy to both children and adults. WARNING! DO NOT PULL INNER OUTSIDE PARTY CRACKER. PULL CRACKER AWAY FROM FACE. DO NOT PULL NEAR EYES OR EARS. PULL BOTH ENDS AT ARMS LENGTH FIRMLY AND SHARPLY. DO NOT REMOVE INNER. WARNING! Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts which could represent a choking hazard. Contents may include glass and items with functional sharp points or edges. Adult supervision is required. Items may fall from crackers whilst pulling.
